tasks.title: Add waiting_to_merge to shared KanbanColumn and Task types
tasks.description: In packages/shared/src/types/task.ts: (1) Add 'waiting_to_merge' to the KanbanColumn union type. (2) On the Task interface, add optional fields mergePausedUntil?: string | null (ISO timestamp) and mergeWaitingOnMain?: boolean for API responses when merge is paused due to baseline quality gates (tooltip/secondary hint only). Document in a brief comment that list/detail kanban column is server-computed for this case; mapStatusToKanban does not need to handle waiting_to_merge (backend computes it). Acceptance: TypeScript builds; no runtime changes. Verification: Run npm run build in packages/shared.

tasks.title: Compute waiting_to_merge in task.service computeKanbanColumn and add optional API fields
tasks.description: In packages/backend/src/services/task.service.ts: (1) Import getMergeStageFromIssue from task-store-helpers (or task-store.service if re-exported). (2) In computeKanbanColumn, before the existing logic: if status === 'open' and getMergeStageFromIssue(issue) is one of 'quality_gate', 'merge_to_main', 'rebase_before_merge', return 'waiting_to_merge'. Do not add a second column for paused-on-main; both in-pipeline and paused map to waiting_to_merge. (3) In storedTaskToTask, after building the base task object, add optional mergePausedUntil (ISO string when extra.merge_quality_gate_paused_until is set and in the future) and mergeWaitingOnMain (boolean true when that condition holds). Read from (issue as Record<string, unknown>).merge_quality_gate_paused_until (hydrateTask spreads extra onto StoredTask). Acceptance: List and detail API return kanbanColumn 'waiting_to_merge' and optional mergePausedUntil/mergeWaitingOnMain when applicable. Verification: Run npm test -- --testPathPattern=task-service in packages/backend (after adding tests in next task).
dependsOn: Add waiting_to_merge to shared KanbanColumn and Task types

tasks.title: Backend unit tests for computeKanbanColumn waiting_to_merge and API payload
tasks.description: In packages/backend/src/__tests__/task-service.test.ts: Add tests for computeKanbanColumn: (1) Task with status open and merge_stage label (e.g. merge_stage:quality_gate) and no merge_quality_gate_paused_until returns waiting_to_merge. (2) Task with status open, merge_stage set, and future merge_quality_gate_paused_until in extra returns waiting_to_merge (same value). (3) Task without merge_stage returns unchanged (ready or backlog per existing logic). (4) Assert listTasks and getTask responses include kanbanColumn: 'waiting_to_merge' and when applicable mergePausedUntil (ISO string) and mergeWaitingOnMain: true. Use mock task store state with labels and extra as needed. Verification: Run npm test -- --testPathPattern=task-service.test in packages/backend.
dependsOn: Compute waiting_to_merge in task.service computeKanbanColumn and add optional API fields

tasks.title: Add kanbanColumn and optional merge fields to WebSocket task events
tasks.description: Backend: (1) In packages/shared/src/types/websocket.ts, add optional kanbanColumn?: KanbanColumn to TaskUpdatedEvent; add optional kanbanColumn?, mergePausedUntil?, mergeWaitingOnMain? to TaskEventPayload. (2) In packages/backend/src/task-store-events.ts: For task.updated, compute kanbanColumn when status==='open' and getMergeStageFromIssue(task) is set (quality_gate, merge_to_main, rebase_before_merge) as 'waiting_to_merge'; compute mergePausedUntil (ISO when extra.merge_quality_gate_paused_until is future) and mergeWaitingOnMain (boolean); include kanbanColumn, mergePausedUntil, mergeWaitingOnMain in the task.updated payload. For task.created and task.closed, extend storedTaskToPayload to include kanbanColumn (same logic: if open and merge_stage set then waiting_to_merge else derive from status e.g. mapStatusToKanban) and optional mergePausedUntil/mergeWaitingOnMain. Use getMergeStageFromIssue from task-store-helpers; read merge_quality_gate_paused_until from task (StoredTask with extra spread). Frontend: (3) In packages/frontend/src/store/slices/executeTaskList.ts, in taskUpdated reducer, when action.payload includes kanbanColumn use it instead of mapStatusToKanban(status). (4) In packages/frontend/src/store/slices/executeThunks.ts, in taskEventPayloadToTask, use p.kanbanColumn when present, else mapStatusToKanban(p.status); pass through mergePausedUntil and mergeWaitingOnMain when present. Acceptance: Event-stream and WebSocket task payloads include kanbanColumn and optional merge fields; list updates in real time without refetch. Verification: Run backend tests for task-store-events if any; run frontend tests for executeTaskList and executeThunks; manual check that task.updated with new fields updates UI.
dependsOn: Compute waiting_to_merge in task.service computeKanbanColumn and add optional API fields

tasks.title: Frontend TaskStatusBadge and executeTaskSort support for waiting_to_merge
tasks.description: In packages/frontend: (1) packages/frontend/src/components/kanban/TaskStatusBadge.tsx: Add waiting_to_merge to COLUMN_LABELS (e.g. 'Waiting to Merge') and to columnColors (choose a distinct theme class, e.g. bg-theme-status-ready or a dedicated token). Ensure TaskStatusBadge renders correctly for column waiting_to_merge (dot or icon). (2) packages/frontend/src/lib/executeTaskSort.ts: In getTimelineSection, map waiting_to_merge to TIMELINE_SECTION.queue (same as ready). In TIMELINE_TIER and STATUS_ORDER, add waiting_to_merge with tier 1 and order between ready and backlog (e.g. ready 1, waiting_to_merge 1, backlog 3). Acceptance: No runtime errors when task.kanbanColumn is waiting_to_merge; sort and section place tasks in queue. Verification: Run npm test for executeTaskSort if tests exist; run frontend build.
dependsOn: Add waiting_to_merge to shared KanbanColumn and Task types

tasks.title: TimelineList Waiting to Merge badge and section/tooltip
tasks.description: In packages/frontend/src/components/execute/TimelineList.tsx: (1) In TimelineRow, when task.kanbanColumn === 'waiting_to_merge', render a single badge/chip labeled 'Waiting to Merge' (reuse TaskStatusBadge with column waiting_to_merge or a small chip). (2) When task.mergeWaitingOnMain is true (or mergePausedUntil is set), show an optional tooltip or secondary hint (e.g. 'Blocked on main') on the badge or row (title or aria-label). (3) In bySection: include tasks with kanbanColumn === 'waiting_to_merge' in the queue/Up Next area—either add a dedicated 'Waiting to Merge' section or group with 'ready' under 'Up Next' with the badge distinguishing them. Per plan, prefer distinct visual treatment; if using a dedicated section, add SECTION_LABELS['waiting_to_merge'] and a section key. (4) Ensure getTimelineSection and section ordering place waiting_to_merge tasks in the correct section. Accessibility: Badge has accessible name; if icon-only, provide aria-label or title. Acceptance: Execute task list shows single 'Waiting to Merge' badge for tasks in that state; optional tooltip when blocked on main. Verification: Run npm test -- --testPathPattern=TimelineList in packages/frontend.
dependsOn: Frontend TaskStatusBadge and executeTaskSort support for waiting_to_merge

tasks.title: Task detail sidebar Waiting to Merge state and optional tooltip
tasks.description: In packages/frontend: (1) Task detail header/status area (e.g. ExecutePhase.tsx or TaskDetailMetadata.tsx) should show 'Waiting to Merge' when selectedTaskData?.kanbanColumn === 'waiting_to_merge'. Use TaskStatusBadge or the same label as list. (2) When mergeWaitingOnMain is true (or mergePausedUntil set), show optional tooltip or hint (e.g. 'Blocked on main') in the task detail header or status area. (3) Ensure ExecutePhase logic that checks isDoneTask, isBlockedTask, isInProgressOrReview does not treat waiting_to_merge as in-progress; keep it as a distinct state for display. Acceptance: Task detail sidebar shows 'Waiting to Merge' and optional 'Blocked on main' hint when applicable. Verification: Run npm test -- --testPathPattern=ExecutePhase in packages/frontend; manual check on task detail.
dependsOn: Frontend TaskStatusBadge and executeTaskSort support for waiting_to_merge

tasks.title: Frontend unit tests for Waiting to Merge badge and tooltip
tasks.description: In packages/frontend/src/components/execute/TimelineList.test.tsx: Add tests that a task with kanbanColumn 'waiting_to_merge' shows the 'Waiting to Merge' badge (e.g. data-testid or text). Optionally test that when mergeWaitingOnMain is true (or mergePausedUntil set), a tooltip or hint 'Blocked on main' is present. In ExecutePhase.test.tsx or TaskDetailMetadata tests if present: assert task detail shows Waiting to Merge when kanbanColumn is waiting_to_merge. Use createMockTask({ kanbanColumn: 'waiting_to_merge', mergeWaitingOnMain: true }). Acceptance: Unit tests cover badge visibility and optional tooltip. Verification: Run npm test -- --testPathPattern='TimelineList|ExecutePhase|TaskDetailMetadata' in packages/frontend.
dependsOn: TimelineList Waiting to Merge badge and section/tooltip
Task detail sidebar Waiting to Merge state and optional tooltip

tasks.title: Integration test for Waiting to Merge in list and API
tasks.description: Add one integration or E2E test: simulate a task in the merge pipeline (e.g. task with merge_stage label set, optional merge_quality_gate_paused_until in extra). Call the task list API (or use task service listTasks) and assert one task has kanbanColumn 'waiting_to_merge'. Optionally assert mergePausedUntil or mergeWaitingOnMain when extra is set. If E2E: open Execute, assert list shows 'Waiting to Merge' for that task. Prefer backend integration test (task route or task service) if that suffices. Acceptance: Single test confirms end-to-end behavior from data to API to (if E2E) UI. Verification: Run the new integration/E2E test in the repo test suite.
dependsOn: Backend unit tests for computeKanbanColumn waiting_to_merge and API payload
TimelineList Waiting to Merge badge and section/tooltip
